# UC-15.4.10 · APC NetBotz Environmental SNMP Humidity Condensation Risk

## Description

High RH with chilled supply air drives condensation on ducts and gear surfaces.

## Value

Prevents corrosion and shorting in edge sites without full BMS.

## Implementation

(1) Pair with supply temp if available. (2) Alert facilities before setpoint changes.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon" earliest=-24h
| eval rh=tonumber(coalesce(humiditySensorRelativeHumidity, rh_pct, ""))
| eval dew_gap=tonumber(coalesce(dewpoint_margin_c, ""))
| where rh>65 OR (isnotnull(dew_gap) AND dew_gap<3)
| stats latest(rh) as rh_pct by sensor_name location
```

## Visualization

Gauge RH; scatter RH vs temp.

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
